Hendy_position: Hendy anchors perception in the operator state of knowledge of the world
Daumas_position: Daumas reconstructs what the operator believed through interview deepening before coding
SERA_vNext_position: SERA vNext should keep perception evidence separate from context and outcome
divergence_or_risk: Interview reconstruction can overstate certainty if not bounded
recommended_action: keep cue recognition and uncertainty explicit

Hendy_position: Hendy asks what goal the operator was trying to achieve
Daumas_position: Daumas records the actor intent as stated in the event reconstruction
SERA_vNext_position: SERA vNext should preserve objective and goal evidence without jumping to violation labels
divergence_or_risk: Intent can be overread from later consequence

Hendy_position: Hendy asks how the operator tried to achieve the goal
Daumas_position: Daumas anchors action in the concrete act or omission at the unsafe moment
SERA_vNext_position: SERA vNext should preserve observed action as its own lane
divergence_or_risk: Later consequence can displace the actual action boundary

Hendy_position: Hendy separates active failure from preconditions

recommended_action: keep active failure and context in separate rows
